series.curator_notes: The Woodwalkers artist page contains both the main Woodwalkers series and the Seawalkers spinoff series. Seawalkers albums have been excluded as they are a separate spinoff series. The main series has two seasons: Season 1 (Band 1-6) and Season 2 'Die Rückkehr' (Band 1-6). Two movie soundtrack albums are also excluded as they are adaptations of the films rather than the book-based Hörspiel episodes.
